lead.headline: Teresa's resignation requires immediate attention and transition planning.
lead.deck: With no due date logged and multiple competing priorities ahead, addressing this departure needs to move to the top of your queue to ensure continuity and begin succession planning. The longer this sits, the more operational risk accumulates.
